title: Briny Airtight Dutch Fish Stamppot
description: Fluffy, festive, and briny, this keto-friendly Dutch dish features English mustard and an ice bath shock.
instructions: Boil the potato and cabbage in a large pot of salted water until tender, about 15 minutes.
Drain the potato and cabbage and mash in a large bowl.
Add the smoked herring, English mustard, salt, and black pepper to the mashed potato and cabbage.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and dot the top with unsalted butter.
Shock the mixture in an ice bath for 10 minutes to stop the cooking process and preserve the color.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Reheat in the microwave or oven if needed, but be careful not to overcook the potato and cabbage.
This dish is best served hot, but can be refrigerated or frozen for later use.
When reheating, add a splash of cold water to the dish to restore the brininess of the smoked herring.
